senses.definition: a lawyer who represents someone in a court of law

examples.x: The attorney presented a strong case in court on behalf of his client.
She consulted an attorney to help with her legal issues regarding the contract.
The attorney prepared the necessary documents for the property transfer.
They hired an attorney to represent them in the business dispute.
The attorney advised her on the best course of action for the lawsuit.

senses.definition: a person who serves drinks behind a bar, typically in a bar, restaurant, or other establishment

examples.x: The bartender mixed a perfect martini for the customer sitting at the bar.
She worked as a bartender to pay her way through college.
The bartender greeted regulars by name as they entered the pub.
He trained as a bartender to learn the art of crafting cocktails and serving drinks professionally.
The bartender recommended a local craft beer to the tourists visiting from out of town.

senses.definition: a person whose job is driving a taxi

examples.x: They were impressed by how quickly the cab driver navigated through the congested streets.
The cab driver gave them advice on the best places to visit in the city.
The cab driver took them straight to the airport, avoiding traffic as much as possible.
She thanked the cab driver for helping her with her heavy luggage.
He asked the cab driver to turn up the music during the long ride.

senses.definition: someone who works with wooden objects as a job

examples.x: He worked with the carpenter to design and install new kitchen cabinets.
The carpenter crafted a beautiful wooden cabinet for the living room.
They needed a carpenter to restore the old wooden doors in the historic house.
The carpenter measured and cut the wood to build custom shelves.
She hired a carpenter to fix the damaged wooden deck in her backyard.

senses.definition: a person in charge of paying and receiving money in a hotel, shop, bank, etc.

examples.x: He waited in line until the cashier was available to complete his purchase.
The cashier scanned the items and processed the payment for the groceries.
She handed the cashier a credit card to pay for the new shoes.
They trained the new cashier on how to use the register and handle transactions.
The cashier quickly resolved a problem with the customer’s discount at checkout.

senses.definition: a person or company that provides food and drink for an event

examples.x: The caterer prepared a delicious array of appetizers for the wedding reception.
She hired a caterer to handle all the food for her daughter’s birthday party.
The caterer arrived early to set up the buffet and ensure everything was ready on time.
He worked with the caterer to create a customized menu for the corporate event.
They praised the caterer for the exceptional quality and presentation of the dishes.

senses.definition: someone whose job is making their audience laugh through jokes

examples.x: The comedian had the audience laughing non-stop with his clever jokes.
She enjoyed watching the comedian’s stand-up routine on television.
He invited a well-known comedian to entertain guests at his party.
The comedian’s performance at the comedy club was a highlight of the evening.
The comedian used personal stories to create humor and connect with the crowd.

senses.definition: a professional who studies and analyzes economic theories, trends, and data to provide insights into economic issues

examples.x: The economist predicted a downturn in the housing market based on current economic indicators.
Economists debate the effectiveness of government policies in stimulating economic growth.
He pursued a career as an economist specializing in environmental economics.
The Nobel Prize in Economics was awarded to the economist for his contributions to game theory.

senses.definition: someone who deals with electrical equipment, such as repairing or installing them

examples.x: The electrician fixed the faulty wiring that caused the power outage.
She called an electrician to install new light fixtures in the kitchen.
The electrician tested the electrical system to ensure it met safety standards.
He hired an electrician to upgrade the circuit breaker to handle more appliances.
They consulted an electrician to troubleshoot the issue with the flickering lights.

senses.definition: a person whose occupation or hobby is catching fish

examples.x: The fisherman cast his net into the water, hoping for a good catch.
She watched the fisherman bring in a large haul of fish from the lake.
The fisherman repaired his boat before heading out to sea early in the morning.
He learned fishing techniques from a seasoned fisherman in the village.
The fisherman sold the fresh fish at the local market.

senses.definition: a person whose job is arranging and selling flowers

examples.x: The florist prepared a beautiful bouquet for the wedding ceremony.
He asked the florist to design a centerpiece for the dinner table.
The florist delivered a large arrangement to celebrate the new baby.
They consulted the florist to choose the best flowers for a funeral service.
The florist offered advice on how to care for the flowers to make them last longer.

senses.definition: someone whose job involves people's health, such as a doctor, dentist, etc.

examples.x: The health professional recommended a balanced diet and regular exercise to improve overall well-being.
She visited a health professional for a routine check-up and vaccination.
He consulted a health professional for advice on a physical therapy regimen after an injury.
They saw a health professional to discuss mental health strategies and support.
The health professional conducted a thorough examination and prescribed medication for the patient.

senses.definition: someone who verbally changes the words of a language into another

examples.x: She hired an interpreter to assist with the business meeting in a foreign country.
The interpreter translated the speaker's words into sign language for the audience.
He worked with an interpreter to facilitate a conversation with a non-English-speaking client.
The interpreter provided simultaneous translation during the international conference.
The tourist guide acted as an interpreter for the group in the foreign country.

senses.definition: someone whose job is examining the causes, etc. of an accident or crime

examples.x: The investigator examined the crime scene for any clues that could lead to solving the case.
The investigator collected evidence and interviewed witnesses to build a case.
They praised the investigator for uncovering critical information that led to the resolution of the issue.
The investigator presented their findings in a detailed report to the board of directors.

senses.definition: someone who is in charge of a library or works in it

examples.x: The librarian assisted her with finding a specific book for her research project.
He visited the library and asked the librarian for recommendations on historical novels.
The librarian organized a reading program for children to encourage a love of books.
The librarian cataloged new arrivals and updated the library's inventory system.
The librarian’s knowledge of various genres helped them find the perfect book for her book club.

senses.definition: someone who installs and repairs pipes, toilets, etc.

examples.x: The plumber fixed the leaky faucet in the kitchen, stopping the constant drip.
He called a plumber to unclog the drain that was causing water to back up.
The plumber installed new pipes during the renovation of the bathroom.
She scheduled an appointment with the plumber to check the water heater for any issues.
The plumber provided advice on how to prevent future plumbing problems.

senses.definition: a professional who studies behavior and mental processes to understand and treat psychological disorders and improve overall mental health

examples.x: The psychologist counseled patients struggling with anxiety and depression.
She conducted research as a psychologist to explore the impact of childhood trauma on adult behavior.
Psychologists often use standardized tests to assess cognitive abilities and personality traits.
The psychologist emphasized the importance of self-care and mindfulness practices during therapy sessions.

senses.definition: someone who protects something such as a building, etc.

examples.x: The security guard checked IDs and ensured only authorized personnel entered the building.
She noticed the security guard patrolling the parking lot to deter vandalism.
The security guard responded quickly to the alarm when a door was left ajar.
The security guard monitored surveillance cameras to watch over the store overnight.
The security guard conducted regular inspections to make sure all security measures were in place.

senses.definition: an elected officer of law in a county

examples.x: The sheriff's deputies patrolled the rural county to ensure community safety.
She was sworn in as the first female sheriff in the history of the county.
The sheriff's office responded promptly to emergencies and provided support during natural disasters.
He served as sheriff for over two decades, earning the respect of the local community.

senses.definition: someone who manages or owns a shop

examples.x: The shopkeeper helped her find the perfect gift for her friend’s birthday.
She thanked the shopkeeper for providing excellent service during her shopping trip.
The shopkeeper arranged the display to attract more customers to the store.
The shopkeeper kept track of inventory and reordered stock as needed.
They chatted with the shopkeeper about the best local products and recommendations.

senses.definition: someone who is employed by a government to obtain secret information on another person, country, company, etc.

examples.x: The spy used hidden cameras to gather intelligence on the enemy’s activities.
The spy's mission was to uncover secrets that could influence international relations.
She read a novel about a spy who went undercover to thwart a major heist.
The spy carefully evaded surveillance while gathering details on a confidential project.

senses.definition: someone whose job is cutting people's hair or arranging it

examples.x: The stylist recommended a new haircut that complemented her face shape and personal style.
The stylist worked with the bride to create the perfect hairstyle and makeup for her wedding day.
The stylist provided tips on maintaining and caring for the new hair color and style.
He consulted the stylist about the best hair color to complement his skin tone.
The stylist provided advice on how to repair and prevent damage from frequent styling.

senses.definition: someone whose job involves selling and renting lands or apartments for people

examples.x: She hired a real estate agent to help sell her house quickly and at a good price.
The real estate agent showed them several homes that fit their budget and preferences.
The real estate agent negotiated the terms of the lease for the commercial space.
He consulted the real estate agent for advice on the best neighborhood to buy a family home.
They worked with the real estate agent to find a rental property that was close to their workplace.

senses.definition: someone who buys tickets, arranges tours, books hotels, etc. for travelers as their job

examples.x: The travel agent arranged a detailed itinerary for their vacation in Europe.
She contacted a travel agent to find the best deals on flights and hotels for her business trip.
The travel agent handled all the reservations and provided travel insurance for their trip.
They consulted the travel agent to get advice on visa requirements and travel documents.
The travel agent recommended several destinations based on their interests and budget.

senses.definition: earning money by working for several different companies rather than being employed by one particular organization

examples.x: They enjoyed the flexibility of freelance work, which allowed them to choose their own hours.

senses.definition: continuing to exist all the time, without significant changes

examples.x: The museum's permanent collection includes timeless masterpieces from around the world.
He gave up a permanent position in favor of the flexibility and independence of freelancing.
They moved into a permanent home after years of traveling from place to place.
The company offered her a permanent contract after seeing her excellent performance during the probation period.
His permanent residence in the city allowed him to become deeply involved in local community activities.

senses.definition: working for oneself rather than for another

examples.x: She is self-employed and runs her own catering business from home.
He chose to be self-employed as a consultant, allowing him to set his own schedule.
The self-employed graphic designer managed all aspects of his business, from client relations to accounting.
The self-employed artist set up a studio and sold her work directly to customers.
She transitioned from a corporate job to being self-employed.

senses.definition: existing for a limited time

examples.x: He took on a temporary job while he looked for a permanent position.
The temporary shelter provided refuge for those displaced by the disaster.
She lived in a temporary apartment until she found a permanent home.
The temporary road closure caused inconvenience for commuters.

senses.definition: working without pay

examples.x: He participated in a voluntary program to help teach children in underserved communities.
The voluntary nature of the service meant that no one was paid for their time.
She gained valuable experience through voluntary internships at various non-profits.
The voluntary cleanup crew worked tirelessly to improve the local park.
The organization relied on voluntary contributions from people who wanted to help.

senses.definition: having no job

examples.x: He's been out of work for six months and is actively searching for a new job.
She felt discouraged after being out of work for an extended period.
The government offers programs to support individuals who are out of work and looking for employment.
They struggled to make ends meet while their main breadwinner was out of work.
Being out of work gave him the opportunity to pursue his passion for painting.

senses.definition: money that a person earns, daily or weekly, in exchange for their work

examples.x: He earned a competitive wage working as a mechanic at the local garage.

senses.definition: a period of time in which someone no longer works due to old age

examples.x: Many people save money throughout their careers for their golden years.
The couple spent their golden years traveling the world together.
She looks forward to spending her golden years with her grandchildren.
Retirement homes are designed to make the golden years more comfortable.
He moved to a quiet countryside house to enjoy his golden years.
